intended_use: Videa Perio Assist is a radiological semi-automated image processing software device intended to aid dental professionals in the measurements and visualization of mesial and distal bone levels associa
intended_use_full: Videa Perio Assist is a radiological semi-automated image processing software device intended to aid dental professionals in the measurements and visualization of mesial and distal bone levels associated with each tooth from bitewing and periapical radiographs. Measurements are made available as linear distances or relative percentages.
target_condition: Interproximal alveolar bone level assessment in patients with suspected or routine periodontal concerns
ground_truth: US licensed dentists labeled data across two phases, and two US licensed periodontists adjudicated those labels to establish reference standard; bench testing used ground truth labeled radiographs across two phases
other_metrics: Recall: 94.4% (bitewing bench), 91.9% (periapical bench); Precision: 84.3% (bitewing bench), 79.1% (periapical bench with CEJ-ABL subgroup); Mean absolute error below 1.5mm threshold for both radiographic types
